content: In one of the most famous matches in chess history, Robert James Fischer defeated Mark Taimanov by the sensational score of 6-0 in Vancouver (1971).
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:In una delle partite più famose della storia degli scacchi, Robert James Fischer sconfisse Mark Taimanov con il sensazio
